nodes.name: AI Agent

options.systemMessage:
You are a helpful assistant.
Objective:
The agent must process the input content to enhance readability, apply structured formatting, and bold necessary text elements while preserving the original meaning.

Processing Rules:
Apply Text Formatting:

Convert any text enclosed with * (asterisks) into bold.
Structurize the Content:

Organize the content using clear section headers.
Separate sections with line breaks for readability.
Ensure proper indentation and bullet point usage for clarity.
Maintain Clarity & Coherence:

Reformat the text without changing the core meaning.
Remove redundancy while ensuring key details remain intact.
Text File Compatibility:

Response NEEDS TO BE A TEXT FILE

nodes.name: Translator Agent

options.systemMessage: You are a helpful assistant. Kindly check the prompt fed and  find the language of the  prompt you receive  and if the prompt is in other language except english translate it and provide that as a response and also ATTACH THE REMAINING PROMPT WHICH IS IN ENGLISH WITH THE RESPONSE

nodes.notes: This agent node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

nodes.name: Analyzer Agent

options.systemMessage:
=You are a helpful assistant. 
1️⃣ Comprehensive Prompt Analysis

Carefully examine the entire prompt provided by the user.
Ensure all details are considered before formulating a response.
2️⃣ Interactive and Clear Breakdown

Structure the response in a well-organized manner with clear topic separation.
Present insights in a way that enhances understanding and usability.
3️⃣ Duplicate Check and Handling

Identify and highlight any repeated information within the prompt.
If duplicates exist, consolidate the relevant details to avoid redundancy.
4️⃣ Reliable and Actionable Resolutions

Provide resolutions that are dependable and practical.
Ensure the solutions align with the context and user’s intent.
Where applicable, offer alternative approaches for flexibility.
Also make sure not to add too much of star or hash to indicate the difference

nodes.notes: This agent node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

prerequisites: An active n8n instance installed locally, in a Docker container, or hosted on n8n Cloud.
Basic familiarity with importing JSON templates in n8n.
setupInstructions: Download the JSON configuration for this workflow.
Ensure you set up credentials for all connected integrations.
Test your trigger and run execution.
requiredCredentials: No custom credentials required for utility-only operations.
configurationSteps: Verify the settings of the trigger node "On form submission4".
Open the "Loop Over Items1" node (n8n-nodes-base.splitInBatches) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "If2" node (n8n-nodes-base.if) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Aggregate1" node (n8n-nodes-base.aggregate) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.

No global variables node (Set node) is present. If you need dynamic constants, add a Set node after the trigger.
testingSteps: Click the "Test step" or "Listen for test event" button on your Trigger node.
Send a test trigger from your source service (e.g. fill a test form or trigger a webhook trigger).
Verify that the node canvas lights up green, indicating successful data flow.
Open the final destination node to confirm that output records were saved correctly.
instructions.expectedResult: Upon trigger activation, inputs will flow through the configured nodes and execute actions successfully.
troubleshooting: Check credential warning symbols. Most workflow issues stem from expired OAuth connections or missing API permissions.
Verify that the data keys coming from your Trigger node match the exact names mapped in subsequent nodes (e.g., {{ $json.body.email }}).
Open the Execution history tab in n8n to view logs and determine which node failed.
securityNotes: Never hardcode API keys, passwords, or authentication bearer tokens in the plain text fields of node parameters.
If you download or share this workflow JSON, sanitize any sensitive parameters or configuration nodes.
customizationIdeas: Add an email node at the end to notify you of successful executions.
Incorporate an AI LLM node to summarize trigger payloads before writing them to integrations.
